testcase.name: should_create_customer_successfully
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.151+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.training.service.CustomerService : event=customer_create_request correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.152+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.training.service.CustomerService : event=customer_save_request correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.152+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.training.service.CustomerService : event=customer_saved customer_id=0e2ded92-1cdb-4c38-8ee9-1cac072eccdb correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.152+07:00 INFO 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.training.service.CustomerService : event=customer_created customer_id=0e2ded92-1cdb-4c38-8ee9-1cac072eccdb correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_create_customer_fail_on_duplicate_email
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.159+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.training.service.CustomerService : event=customer_create_request correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.159+07:00 WARN 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.training.service.CustomerService : event=customer_created_failed reason=DUPLICATE_EMAIL correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_create_customer_fail_on_duplicate_nik
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.160+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.training.service.CustomerService : event=customer_create_request correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.160+07:00 WARN 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.training.service.CustomerService : event=customer_created_failed reason=DUPLICATE_NIK correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_throw_not_found_when_customer_does_not_exist
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.161+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.training.service.CustomerService : event=customer_find_by_id customer_id=35c9fb2b-6034-48cc-96ad-4115662c9789 correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.161+07:00 WARN 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.training.service.CustomerService : event=customer_not_found customer_id=35c9fb2b-6034-48cc-96ad-4115662c9789 correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_return_all_customers
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.162+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.training.service.CustomerService : event=customer_find_all correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.162+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.training.service.CustomerService : event=customer_find_all_result count=1 correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_search_customers_by_name
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.162+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.training.service.CustomerService : event=customer_search_by_name correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.163+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.training.service.CustomerService : event=customer_search_by_name_result count=1 correlation_id=null
